'''Byblos RepulsorDrive''' was a subsidiary of [[Byblos Drive Yards/Legends|Byblos Drive Yards]] that produced [[combat cloud car]]s and [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]] for local [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|planetary police forces]], as well as the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="EGVV" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-03-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''
